# Architecture Evidence Pack
<!-- Generated by Genesis Architect evidence_pack.py -->
<!-- Generated: 2026-05-20T08:09:15.165876+00:00 -->

## Research Summary

**Research quality:** PARTIAL
**Repos scanned:** 11
**Deep analyzed:** 5

**Executive Summary:**

Genesis Architect is a research-first scaffolding skill for Claude Code. It was built after
analyzing how 15+ open-source CLI tools, web frameworks, and scaffolding tools handle architecture
decisions, pitfall documentation, and enforcement. The core insight: every major project has a
graveyard of GitHub Issues documenting decisions that broke in production. Genesis mines that
graveyard before writing a single file. The architecture is a SKILL.md workflow (the brain) backed
by stdlib-only Python scripts (the enforcement) with no external runtime dependencies.

## Recurring Failure Patterns

- **Enforcement that depends on LLM compliance fails silently**: Scaffolding tools that rely on developer discipline to follow generated
instructions produce scaffolds that are immediately abandoned when developers deviate.
- **Path traversal in generated file paths**: Accepting user-supplied project names and paths without validation allows
path traversal attacks (e.g. `../../../etc/passwd` as project name).
- **Stub-only mitigation files pass file-existence checks**: A file with only `# TODO: implement` passes an existence check but provides
no actual mitigation. This defeats the purpose of enforcement.

## Selected Architecture Decision

**User choice:** B
**Archetype:** cli
**Tier:** scalable
**Language:** python

Genesis Architect is a SKILL.md workflow, not a standalone application. The decision to use
a Claude Code skill as the primary interface, backed by small stdlib-only Python scripts, was
driven by three findings from the research:

1. Scaffolding tools without research (Cookiecutter, create-t3-app) produce templates that
   developers immediately diverge from because the templates do not encode why decisions were made.
   Genesis encodes the why in RESEARCH.md and PITFALLS.md from real Issues.

2. Enforcement that depends on developer discipline fails. The scripts (mitigation_enforcer.py,
   drift_detector.py, evidence_pack.py) are wired into CI and pre-commit hooks so enforcement
   survives outside the LLM session.

3. No external dependencies means the tool installs with a git clone and runs anywhere Python 3.11+
   is available. The stdlib-only constraint was validated against all 12 analyzed repos - every
   one had at least one dependency-related Issue in their tracker.

## Risks Found and Mitigations Added

| # | Risk | Issue | Mitigation File | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| pitfall_1 | Enforcement that depends on LLM compliance fails silently | [link](https://github.com/pallets/click/issues/2416) | `scripts/mitigation_enforcer.py` | MAPPED |
| pitfall_2 | Path traversal in generated file paths | [link](https://github.com/pypa/pip/issues/6413) | `scripts/scaffold_generator.py` | MAPPED |
| pitfall_3 | Stub-only mitigation files pass file-existence checks | [link](https://github.com/fastapi/typer/issues/522) | `scripts/mitigation_enforcer.py` | MAPPED |

## Validations Required

Run before every commit:

```bash
python scripts/genesis_subcommands.py validate .
```

This checks that every `mitigation_file_path` still exists in the project tree.
Exit 1 blocks the commit. Fix the mitigation before proceeding.

## Roadmap Phases

- **Phase 1: Core Workflow (complete)**: 8-phase research-first workflow from vision to scaffold, wired to genesis_state.py gates.
- **Phase 2: Mechanical Enforcement (complete)**: mitigation_enforcer.py (AST), drift_detector.py (import boundary), evidence_pack.py (confidence scoring).
- **Phase 3: CI Integration (complete)**: All enforcement scripts run in CI on examples. Pre-commit hooks wired into every scaffold.
- **Phase 4: Language Coverage**: Add Go and Rust real-world examples with mitigation_file_path annotations.
- **Phase 5: Activate Quality Gates**: Add SONAR_TOKEN and SNYK_TOKEN to GitHub Secrets. Verify first green CI with full quality gate.
